Contact Us to Enroll!
WIC provides healthy foods, nutrition tips & breastfeeding support for pregnant/postpartum individuals, infants and children up to the age of 5.
Contact Us!
About WIC
WIC Services
WIC offers helpful information and resources to help you and your family live a healthy life.
Learn more about our services
!
Do I Qualify?
Click here
to learn if you or your child qualifies for WIC and what to bring to your first appointment.
Hours and Locations
WIC has 4 clinic locations in San Francisco.
Find one closest to you
!
Breastfeeding Services
WIC provides breastfeeding support through counseling and addresses any concerns you may have to
help you reach your breastfeeding goals.
Healthcare Providers
WIC relies on health care providers to
refer WIC-eligible families
, especially those who are in need of
breastfeeding support
.
Click here
to learn more on how to enroll and stay engaged with WIC.
CalFresh for WIC Families
If you participate in WIC, you may automatically qualify for CalFresh food benefits and free diapers.
Click here
to learn more about CalFresh.
Resources for WIC families
The California WIC Card makes shopping fast and easy. Take a look at this
instructional video
to find out more.
Video en Español
Shopping made easy with WIC App
Shopping for your WIC foods has never been more convenient!
Learn More
About
The Women, Infants and Children (WIC) supplemental nutrition program helps individuals who are pregnant or postpartum, infants and children up to age 5 eat well, be active, and stay healthy. WIC encourages fathers, grandparents or other guardians who care for eligible children to apply! WIC services are provided at no cost to you.
USDA/FNS Nondiscrimination Statement
